headline: GE HealthCare next-gen SIGNA MR technology helps advance research discovery and translate innovation into clinical impact
summary: CHICAGO, May 11, 2026--As the global magnetic resonance (MR) community convenes for the International Society for Magnetic Resonance in Medicine (ISMRM) 2026 Annual Meeting, GE HealthCare (Nasdaq: GEHC) today announced advancements in research tools and MR systems that aim to accelerate discovery, strengthen collaboration across research programs, and turn innovation into meaningful clinical achievements.
